description: Gemini single feedback prompt for reference-audio vs user-audio speaking evaluation
notes: Prompt directories stay single-versioned by task name. Revision tracking is kept in metadata and git history.

changelog.changes: Switch single feedback to Gemini-owned display transcription and issue-point timestamps only; word-level transcription timestamps are no longer requested.
Flatten prompt layout by removing the v1 directory and keep revision tracking in metadata only.
